title: Help the World Work from Home! (And have the chance to star in our next video campaign!)
excerpt:

posts.author: Julia-monday.com (Julia Fagelman)
posts.cookedHtml:
This is your chance to help people around the world transition to WFH and potentially star in our next campaign!

Tell us how you and your team are working remotely and using monday.com in a short “at home” video (you can shoot it on your mobile phone or however you prefer) and help others through the transition.

Send it to us via this form by Tuesday 24 March, for a chance to feature in our next campaign!
